title: BIllie Eilish Music Pack :D
description: Adds some Billie Eilish music for the game
body:
I made this Billie Eilish Minecraft music pack because I thought her songs would make the game way cooler than the usual music. So, it swaps out the background music. Now, when you're building, mining, or just wandering, you’ll hear Billie. It gives the game a darker, more emotional, and even chill vibe. Some songs make cave exploring intense, while others are perfect for watching the sunset.

If you love Billie Eilish and Minecraft, this pack is for you. It’s like giving your world its own Billie Eilish soundtrack. I’ve been using it for a while, and it totally changes the game’s mood for the better.

Heads up: Minecraft might say the pack doesn’t work, but ignore that. It’s wrong. The pack works once it’s loaded. Just ignore the warning and enjoy Billie in Minecraft!
